name: Social media analysis and automated email generation
description: Reads prospect data from Google Sheets, scrapes their social media profiles with Firecrawl, uses Claude AI to analyze online presence and generate personalized outreach emails, and sends them via Gmail. Adapted from n8n's social media analysis and email generation workflow.

source.originalName: Social media analysis and automated email generation

sheetsKey.description: Google Sheets connection key for prospect data

firecrawlKey.description: Firecrawl connection key for scraping social profiles

gmailKey.description: Gmail connection key for sending outreach emails

slackKey.description: Slack connection key for status updates

slackChannel.description: Slack channel ID for campaign updates

spreadsheetId.description: Google Sheets spreadsheet ID with prospect data

sheetRange.description: Sheet range with columns: Name, Email, Social URL, Company

senderName.description: Name to use in the email signature

companyName.description: Your company name for personalized emails

valueProposition.description: Your product/service value proposition for email content

steps.name: Read prospect data from Google Sheets
Scrape social media profiles with Firecrawl
Compile social profile data for AI analysis
Build Claude prompt for email generation
Build Slack Block Kit campaign summary
